concerns.detail: Added personal insults including '小丑🤡一个' (clown emoji), '乱咬人' (biting randomly), '破防了孩子' (triggered/broke defense, child), and condescending attacks like '你是来找爹妈还是来找导师的？'
concerns.excerpt: 小丑🤡一个，大家都不理你不代表你可以一直乱咬人

concerns.detail: Inserted provocative reference '我的奋斗' (Mein Kampf/Hitler's book), constituting an unsupported character judgment/comparison
concerns.excerpt: 童年 · 在人间 · 我的奋斗

concerns.detail: Deleted professor name 'Tianhao Wang' from section header, removing specific identification of the advisor being criticized while retaining the substantive criticism, potentially suppressing discoverability
